title: PahanPack
description: Resource pack with renaming of items.
body:
PahanPack is a series of resource packs that were created for fun. To get the items you want, rename certain items (look at the table). In the recent update (PahanPack part 2), not only hats, but also other things appeared (details in the table).
Be sure to have optifine or CIT resewn mod for fabric.


<details>
<summary>Table</summary>
  
At the beginning, you can write in both small and capital letters. \ Можно писать как с заглавной так и с маленькой буквы.

  
| Name                | Example               | Name in Minecraft    | Item    |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Cat              | ![cat](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/a9a451fd-0c70-4753-b991-fed38437881c)              | Cat, кот             | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Milk            | ![Milk](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/46e855b3-8a64-405e-8961-53728e1a12c9)              | Milk, молоко            | Milk Bucket            |
| Flash            | ![Flash](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/753c5b98-ca7b-402b-9c54-0e379872ad95)              | Flash, фонарик             | Torch, lantern              |
| Chocolate | ![choco](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/8f184966-ec85-484c-8104-c3f93b49fb69) | Chocolate, шоколадка | Cookie             |
| Glasses | ![glass](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/d389d72f-716a-42ab-906f-7080115a5d84) | Glasses, очки | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Ushanka | ![usha](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/fea30ad0-1a5b-45b7-bc63-cb5d36067bba) | Ushanka, ушанка | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Mask | ![Mask](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/03f93365-f4ac-4eeb-a37f-e80f4e502f18) | Mask, маска | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Candies | ![Candies](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/550293ac-50ad-48bc-a311-b55c55a24285) | Candies, конфеты | Cookie             |
| Headphone | ![head](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/3386add5-0dbc-4933-aab6-0d84dc55bfbc) | Headphone, headphones, наушники | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Cap | ![cap](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/d00fb132-a6bf-4ba1-83b8-793c76deca05) | Cap, кепка | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Vitamins | ![vita](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/2634d6ab-66cf-4cac-b401-b621c2e736f7) | Vitamins, vitamin, витамины | Apple, beetroot, cooked cod, raw cod, raw chicken, raw rabbit, raw mutton, raw salmon, cooked salmon, steak, carrot, egg             |
| Villager hat | ![Hat](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/a73a8687-8fb9-4dea-83af-a54555d2004e) | Villager, житель | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Snowman | ![Snow](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/0c9e42c3-26a6-4667-b29a-9d93b9338bc7) | Snowman, снеговик | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Rainbow | ![Rgb](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/847e8435-98f8-465e-8933-a0174217f726) | Rainbow, RGB, rgb, браслет на голову | Carved Pumpkin             |
| Bun | ![Bun](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/a065f6d1-3ad8-4d64-833f-275c693135ab) | Bun, плюшка | Cookie, bread             |
| Pistol | ![Pistol](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/6dc93030-1e8e-41c7-9f17-b2b36fe2e547) | Pistol, пистолет | Crossbow            |
| Phone | ![Phone](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/7cc6bcb5-81f1-472b-b12a-05e14d353f57) | Phone, телефон | Iron ingot             |
| Pen | ![Pen](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/42e8f499-3d2b-4196-9e66-570dc1cff41a) | Pen, ручка | Glow ink sac, ink sac  |
| Dumplings | ![Dump](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/786700ad-f93e-4d78-b864-f0b852107b31) | Dumplings, pelmeni, пельмени | Beetroot soup, suspicious stew, rabbit stew             |
| Pahan | ![Pahan](https://github.com/Pahan3568/PahanPack/assets/122900717/a563651b-125f-4ef6-8581-ff0d30f7ce04) | Pahan | Carved Pumpkin             |
</details>

_Optifine is required for the resource pack to work. If you are on Fabric then use the CIT Resewn mod, or OptiFabric._
